summary: DialBox Fortune Caller Oracle Bible Phase 1 verified end-to-end. Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass (persona ordering, cyndi metadata, Cyndi & Louise endpoint, Spirit Taco Tuesday swap, non-Tuesday goy, zoltan + ruby regression). Frontend: Cyndi & Louise guided flow (topic -> name -> question -> dual-voice reading) works fully; oracle list ordering is correct with 'Cyndi & Louise' at slot 2, 'Miss Cleo' at slot 4, and 'Spirit Taco' at slot 5 (today is Tuesday, so relabelForToday swap is active). Regression on other lines still works.

test_results.backend_pytest: 7/7 PASS (/app/backend/tests/test_iteration12.py). Persona list is exactly [zoltan, cyndi, ruby, calypso, goy, zelda, count, sphinx, nyx]; 'az' removed. /programs/cyndi returns persona_name including Cyndi/Louise, voice='nova', text & sign_off. /programs/fortune weekday=2 -> persona_name='Spirit Taco', voice='ballad', traveling=true. weekday=3 -> master sum dum goy, traveling=false. zoltan + ruby endpoints healthy (200).
test_results.oracle_ordering_ui: PASS — CRT after dial 1 shows: 1 Zartan the Great, 2 Cyndi & Louise, 3 Madame Ruby, 4 Miss Cleo, 5 Spirit Taco (Tuesday label), 6 Zelda, 7 Count, 8 Sphinx, 9 Nyx.
test_results.cyndi_guided_flow: PASS — Dialing 2 enters mode cyndi_topic and displays topic menu (Love/Money/Career/Family/Friendship/Health & Well-Being/The Future/Difficult Decisions/General Reading). Pressing 1 (Love) triggers name prompt with data-testid=cyndi-name-input; typing 'Alex' + Send moves to question prompt (data-testid=cyndi-question-input); typing question + Send generates a full dual-voice reading (Cyndi + Louise interjections, shared message, practical next step, sign-off 'The message is complete...') then result-mode footer.
test_results.spirit_taco_display: PASS — Frontend relabelForToday() correctly relabels persona at slot 5 to 'Spirit Taco — Tuesday's traveling food psychic — the Master is resting' on Tuesday.
test_results.regression_dial0_return_to_menu: PASS — Dialing 0 from oracle list returns to main menu (visible in CRT/menu preview).
test_results.regression_mindline_magic8: PASS — Dial 3 shows 'Connecting to MindLine...' and Dial 8 opens Magic 8 Dial (verified via CRT tail).

critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is now 1651 lines (grew from 1552). The Cyndi flow adds another sub-state-machine on top of an already-large onKey. Extraction into per-line hooks/reducers is increasingly urgent for maintainability.

Automation tip (for future test agents): the keypad debounces digits via INTER_DIGIT_MS=1300 and buttons are `disabled` while mode==='busy'. Between two dials, WAIT for a mode transition marker in the CRT (e.g., 'CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE' after dial 1) AND then wait ~1600ms extra before pressing the next digit; otherwise digits get concatenated (e.g., 1+2 -> '12' -> not-in-service) or dropped.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cyndi flow testids: cyndi-name-input, cyndi-question-input, shared Send button mindline-send-btn. Cyndi modes are cyndi_topic, cyndi_name, cyndi_question. When automating the Cyndi flow, wait for 'CHOOSE YOUR ORACLE' after dial 1, then wait >=1600ms before dialing 2, then wait for 'choose a topic' text before dialing topic digit. Spirit Taco replaces Master Sum Dum Goy only on Tuesdays (JS Date.getDay()===2); on other days slot 5 will show 'Master Sum Dum Goy'. LLM (Universal Key) is currently funded — reading rendered fully; HTTP 402 handling exists in code and is acceptable per spec.
